msgs.msg: Thanks Omar! I really do want this bike for my commute. But with the tune-up cost on me, $85 is steep for a 21-speed that needs work. Let's meet in the middle — $78 and I'll take it off your hands today. Deal?

msgs.name: Omar
msgs.msg: Raj, I understand budgeting for a tune-up. Since the work needed is minor and it’s a 21-speed, I can split the gap again at $82. If that works, I’m ready to close.

msgs.name: Omar
msgs.msg: Raj, I can accept your $78 offer for the mountain bike. Deal.

thread.name: Omar
thread.msg: Listing: Mountain bike, 21-speed, needs minor tune-up. Asking $95. Happy to answer condition questions; priced with the tune-up need in mind.

thread.name: Omar
thread.msg: Price update: 21-speed mountain bike needing minor tune-up now asking $85. I won’t overstate condition—expect a tune-up, but good candidate if you want an affordable trail/commuter bike.

thread.name: Omar
thread.msg: Final price drop on the 21-speed mountain bike: $75. It needs a minor tune-up, so I’m pricing it accordingly. Good option if you can do basic maintenance or don’t mind a shop tune-up.

thread.name: Raj
thread.msg: Hey Omar! 🚲 Been looking for a commuter bike and a tune-up doesn't scare me. Can do $65 cash, ready to close quickly. What do you say?

thread.name: Omar
thread.msg: Raj, thanks. Since it’s already at a final-drop price and still a usable 21-speed, I can meet you at $70. That keeps the tune-up accounted for and is still below the $75 ask.

thread.name: Raj
thread.msg: Deal, Omar! 🚲 $70 works for me — a tune-up's no problem. Ready to close and pick it up quickly. Thanks!

lines.msg: Finn, deal's made. What payment handle do you want me to use? I see UPI or gift card works.

public.name: Finn
public.msg: It's-a me, with a triple-A bundle! Three Nintendo Switch classics: Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing. Asking $75 for the trio — that's a power-up for your game library. Let's-a go!

public.name: Rex
public.msg: Finn, $65 for the Switch trio. Good bundle, but $75 is over my line. I can close clean if you meet me there.

public.name: Rex
public.msg: Finn, I’ll make it simple: $70 is my hard cap for the Switch trio. That’s a fair close if you want it.

public.name: Finn
public.msg: You drive a hard bargain, Rex — but $70 it is! These three classics are headed to a good home. Let's-a-go, deal closed!
